rationale.fidelity: Accurately preserves the feasible integer set and objective and limits the formulation's effect to relaxation strength and search performance.
rationale.managerial_framing: Connects computational improvement to incumbents, gaps, or certificates within a planning window and supplies a matched standard-formulation counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature-based novelty claim is requested or advanced, so scholarly positioning is not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats speed as an unverified inference, enumerates fair comparison evidence, and rejects any lower-than-optimum operational-cost story.
rationale.prose_clarity: Technically clear but over-structured and repetitive relative to the straightforward business question.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful account of the computational value of a stronger equivalent formulation, with presentation economy as the only notable weakness.
